name: @borjie/sleep-pass-orchestrator
description: Sleep-pass orchestrator — 60s heartbeat ticks dispatch off-peak passes (DLQ replay, cache warm-up, data-quality, index maintenance, audit-chain verify, expired-token cleanup, metrics rollup, dormant-tenant detector). Each pass is time-boxed via AbortController. Adapters are injected (Drizzle/Redis ports). Ported from LITFIN PROJECT/src/core/heartbeat.
